meaning: n.不毛,不育,中性,无结果,无菌状态,思想贫乏
examples: The disease can cause sterility in men and women.
This disease causes sterility in both males and females.
The zone of massive sterility coincides geographically, grosso modo, with the regions in central Congo
Defying Hollywood stereotypes of quiet sterility, they are usually noisy and cold, from all the air conditioning.
Sterility guidelines, such as draping the patient in a sterile sheet and wearing a mask and gown, are often forgotten.
